---
title: Oxford Nanopore Technology
date: 2026-01-01
published-title: Created
date-modified: last-modified
title-block-banner: "#212529"
---

## [Nanopore Technology](nanopore-technology.qmd)

An overview of how Oxford Nanopore sequencing works, including the ionic current sensing mechanism, available devices (MinION, GridION, PromethION), and output file formats.

## [Nanopore Sequencing Libraries](nanopore-libraries.qmd)

Library preparation strategies for ONT sequencing, covering ligation, rapid, and PCR-based kits, barcoding and multiplexing, direct RNA sequencing, and adaptive sampling.

## [Basecalling](nanopore-basecalling.qmd)

Converting raw nanopore signal (squiggles) into nucleotide sequences using Dorado, including accuracy models, quality scores, and modified base detection.
